zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaretha van Lotharingen Vrouwe van Aerschot於大約1420年出生在法國德 艾斯特姆特-吉莫瑟勒瓦德艾蒙特時，她的父親Graf Antoine de Vaudémont20歲，母親Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale23歲。她於1432年與Graaf Antoine I 'de Grote" van Croy Heer van Croy, Renty en Aarschot結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1477年9月15日在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯a奧-波爾希享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaretha van Lotharingen Vrouwe van Aerschot于大约1420年出生在法国德 艾斯特姆特-吉莫瑟勒瓦德艾蒙特时，她的父亲Graf Antoine de Vaudémont20岁，母亲Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale23岁。她于1432年与Graaf Antoine I 'de Grote" van Croy Heer van Croy, Renty en Aarschot结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1477年9月15日在法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯a奧-波爾希享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Margaretha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margrethe
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaretha van Lotharingen Vrouwe van Aerschot was born about 1420, in Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, France, her father, Graf Antoine de Vaudémont, was 20 and her mother, Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale, was 23. She married Graaf Antoine I 'de Grote" van Croy Heer van Croy, Renty en Aarschot in 1432. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 15 September 1477, in Château-Porcien, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaretha van Lotharingen Vrouwe van Aerschot est née environ 1420, à Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, France, son père, Graf Antoine de Vaudémont, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Graaf Antoine I 'de Grote" van Croy Heer van Croy, Renty en Aarschot en 1432. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 septembre 1477, à Château-Porcien, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaretha van Lotharingen Vrouwe van Aerschot um 1420 in Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Graf Antoine de Vaudémont 20 und ihre Mutter Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale 23. Sie hat 1432 Graaf Antoine I 'de Grote" van Croy Heer van Croy, Renty en Aarschot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. September 1477 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Château-Porcien, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaretha van Lotharingen Vrouwe van Aerschot è nata il circa 1420 nel Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, Francia, sua padre, Graf Antoine de Vaudémont, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Graaf Antoine I 'de Grote" van Croy Heer van Croy, Renty en Aarschot nel 1432. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 15 settembre 1477, nel Château-Porcien, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaretha van Lotharingen Vrouwe van Aerschotが約1420年にフランスグランド エストメウルスエ-エト-モセルヴァウドeモントで生まれた時，父Graf Antoine de Vaudémontは20歳，母Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumaleは23歳であった。1432年にGraaf Antoine I 'de Grote" van Croy Heer van Croy, Renty en Aarschotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1477年9月15日にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスチaテアウ-プオルシンで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaretha van Lotharingen Vrouwe van Aerschot(이)가 대략 1420년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 우르테-트-모셀 바드e몽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Graf Antoine de Vaudémont(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1432년 Graaf Antoine I 'de Grote" van Croy Heer van Croy, Renty en Aarschot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1477년 9월 15일 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 cha테오-포르시에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaretha van Lotharingen Vrouwe van Aerschot nasceu aproximadamente 1420, em Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Graf Antoine de Vaudémont, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Graaf Antoine I 'de Grote" van Croy Heer van Croy, Renty en Aarschot em 1432. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de setembro de 1477, em Château-Porcien, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaretha van Lotharingen Vrouwe van Aerschot родилась около 1420 г. в местности ваудeмонт, меурте-ет-моселл, гранд эст, Франция, её отцу по имени Graf Antoine de Vaudémont было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Graaf Antoine I 'de Grote" van Croy Heer van Croy, Renty en Aarschot в 1432 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 15 сентября 1477 г. в местности чaто-порсиен, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaretha van Lotharingen Vrouwe van Aerschot nació aproximadamente 1420, en Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Graf Antoine de Vaudémont, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Graaf Antoine I 'de Grote" van Croy Heer van Croy, Renty en Aarschot en 1432. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 15 de septiembre de 1477, en Château-Porcien, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, a la edad de 58 años.
